fields.helpText: This is the IIV TRANSMISSION QUEUE record associated with this EICD Identification inquiry.
This is the date that the IIV TRANSMISSION QUEUE entry was created for an EICD Identification inquiry.
This is the National EICD PAYER entry used when creating an EICD Identification inquiry.
This is the IIV RESPONSE TRACE NUMBER (#365,.09) associated with an EICD  Identification response that traces back to the EICD TRANSMISSION  (#365.18,.01) field.
This is the PATIENT record associated with an EICD Identification inquiry.
This is the IIV RESPONSE file record associated with an EICD Identification response.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:Error;1:Active Policies Found;2:No Active Policies Found;3:Clearinghouse Timeout;
fields.helpText: This field contains a result code based on response data returned  from an EICD Identification inquiry.
When an EICD Identification response returns with one or more  discovered policies, they are detailed in this sub-file to be used when creating Verification inquiries.
